---
name: Feature / improvement
about: Propose new capability or an enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## The need
What problem does this solve? Who/what benefits?

## Proposed approach
High level. Reuse existing patterns where possible.

## Cost & budget impact
Net-new AWS spend? Bedrock calls? (the platform runs on a $75/mo enforced ceiling — see `docs/COST_TRACKER.md`).

## Affected areas
Lambdas / CDK stacks / MCP tools / site / docs.

## Does this need an ADR?
Architectural or irreversible decisions → add one to `docs/DECISIONS.md`.
